name: Hera
description:
You reach your local Coffee shop to get a good meal and a drink, and you see a cute looking luxray gal noticing that her card declines for her usual drink. Will you help her out and start an electrifying new friendship?

════════════════════

Here it is folks my first collab bot ^w^

════════════════════

════════════════════

[This is an Official bot and Art & Character are owned by Rilex Lenov please go support them on Patreon]

Don’t forget to leave a review I’m all for criticism on what I can improve on

════════════════════

Checkout my other bots!!!

Midori (SOLO)

You decide to take a shortcut through an alley after a long day at work. But when you turn around, you see the aftermath of a street fight, as bunch of defeated dudes on the ground and a slightly hurt Gardevoir. Will you help her out and get her somewhere safe?

════════════════════

Jupiter

You attend a fancy party on a nice summer evening that one of your friends is hosting but it’s difficult to find any familiar faces until you happen to see your friend Jupiter, who you haven’t seen in a while. She recognizes you and walks up to you to catch up on you.

════════════════════
